LIGHTNING_ORB.title: Lightning Bolt
LIGHTNING_ORB.description:
Passive: At the end of your turn, deal [blue]{passive}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
Evoke: Deal [blue]{evoke}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
FROST_ORB.title: Frost Shield
FROST_ORB.description:
Passive: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]{passive}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
Evoke: Gain [blue]{evoke}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
DARK_ORB.title: Soul Crystal
DARK_ORB.description:
Passive: At the end of your turn, this orb gains [blue]{passive}[/blue] stored damage.
Evoke: Deal stored damage to the lowest HP enemy.
PLASMA_ORB.title: Primal Engine
PLASMA_ORB.description:
Passive: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]{passive}[/blue] Energy.
Evoke: Gain [blue]{evoke}[/blue] Energy.
